heading: Roads on Indian reservations; appropriation
label: 318a Roads on Indian reservations; appropriation
text: Appropriations are hereby authorized out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated for material, equipment, supervision and engineering, and the employment of Indian labor in the survey, improvement, construction, and maintenance of Indian reservation roads not eligible to Government aid under the Federal Highway Act and for which no other appropriation is available, under such rules and regulations as may be prescribed by the Secertary of the Interior.1So in original. Probably should be “Secretary”.1
